Attorney, Steven M. Campora of the law offices of Dreyer Babich Buccola Wood Campora LLP (Tel: 916.379.3500; Email: scampora@dbbwc.com) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Karen P. Kimmey of the law offices of Farella Braun et al, (Tel: 415.954.4400; Email: kkimmey@fbm.com) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

Also present but not arguing are attorneys Chris Wood, co-counsel for plaintiff, and Nadia Arid, co-counsel for defendant.

After declining to stipulate to Judge Pro Tem, defendant stipulates and both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides authorize the court clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.
